heading: Procedure after finding by international forum
label: 2554 Procedure after finding by international forum

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: If an appropriate international forum finds that a standards-related activity being engaged in within the United States conflicts with the obligations of the United States under the Agreement, the interagency trade organization established under shall review the finding and the matters related thereto with a view to recommending appropriate action.section 1872(a) of this title

children.heading: Cross reference
children.label: b Cross reference
children.text: For provisions of law regarding remedies available to domestic persons alleging that standards activities engaged in by Parties to the Agreement (other than the United States) violate the obligations of the Agreement, see .section 2411 of this title
